summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Usina Recicla B2B landing page. All core functionality verified including navigation, WhatsApp integration, blog system, and mobile responsiveness.
passed_tests: Homepage loads with correct hero title 'Gestao Integrada de Residuos Solidos e Efluentes Liquidos'
Navigation links work correctly (Servicos, Sobre, Blog)
WhatsApp floating button appears after 1.5s delay and links to correct URL (wa.me/5519971636969)
Services bento grid renders 3 service cards as expected
Compliance section displays MTR, CDF, CADRI information correctly
FAQ accordion opens and closes functionality works
Blog page displays 5 article cards correctly
Blog article pages render with full content and navigation works
About page displays CEO Raphael Pascon information
Footer renders with contact information and WhatsApp CTA
Mobile responsive design works at 375px width
Mobile navigation menu opens and closes correctly
Navigation dropdown for services functions properly
All service pages load with correct content (coleta-de-efluentes, gestao-de-residuos, documentacao-ambiental)
Hero section CTA buttons work (WhatsApp and navigation)
Service card links are clickable and functional
All designated WhatsApp CTAs link to correct phone number
